title: Xaero's Optimal Beacons Add-On
description: Plan beacon networks directly on the map. This addon for Xaero's World Map and Xaero's Minimap lets you preview beacon coverage and automatically calculate optimal beacon placements for any selected area.
body: Beacon planning tools for Xaero's World Map. Preview beacon coverage, generate optimized beacon placement plans, move coverage gaps, view overlap heatmaps, and track total pyramid materials required. Optional Xaero Minimap support adds temporary waypoint markers for each planned beacon.
